title: stellaria media var. neglecta
intro: Stellaria media var. neglecta, also known as lawn chicory or common chickweed, is a perennial weed that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Stellaria media var. neglecta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
